training_status: Active gym, reduced gym attendance since Sept, still very active

benefits.description: Dropped from 268 lbs to 205 lbs on tirzepatide, titrating up over months

protocol_notes: Started Jan 2025 at SW 268 lbs. Titrated tirzepatide from 2.5mg up to 15mg every 8-10 days with good results. Hit a stall in Sept 2025 at ~205 lbs. Moved to 17.5mg every 8 days since Nov 2025. Currently at 215 lbs (winter fluctuation noted as typical +10 lbs). Goal weight is 185 lbs. Also on clomid for low T management. Considering adding retatrutide or switching from tirzepatide.
